title: Fix admin users table layout misalignment
description: The admin users table rows are misaligned and unreadable. 1. Inspect `frontend/pages/admin/users/index.vue` and its CSS. 2. Ensure table headers and cells have consistent padding and vertical alignment. 3. Fix the `desktop-only` / `mobile-only` logic to prevent layout shifts. 4. Ensure `UCard` padding overrides don't break the table's full-width appearance.
acceptance_criteria: Table headers align with table body columns
Columns have sufficient spacing and don't overflow
Vertical alignment in cells is 'middle' or 'top' consistently
Mobile view shows correct subset of columns without breaking layout
